name: agent-workflow
description: Role-based multi-agent workflow skills for discovery, phased handoff, phase-cycle orchestration, cross-session review, local Nitpicker review, and ZRT phase commit closeout.

interface.shortDescription: Multi-agent workflow skills for phased implementation, orchestration, and commit closeout.
interface.longDescription: Use role-based Discovery, Planner, Implementer, Reviewer, Nitpicker, phase-cycle orchestration, and ZRT phase commit closeout workflows across Codex, Claude, and other coding-agent sessions.
defaultPrompt: Use phased implementation handoff for the next phase.
Use phase-cycle-orchestrator to run the next phase loop.
Run cross-session plan review on this prompt.
Run local Nitpicker review for the changed files.
Use zrt-phase-commit to verify and commit this phase.
